Welcome back. So there's a little bit of setup to maximize your likelihood of success and that's what we're going to cover in this one. So this is really how to set up your Facebook profile if you're messaging from Facebook. All these things apply on Facebook as much as they do on Instagram. Facebook has a little bit more features than Instagram does, but I'll go through this whole process and then I'll explain the Instagram side briefly because Instagram is pretty straightforward. Alright, so one, make sure that your cover photo has transformations and a headline and a call to action. So you have a bunch of transformations and then put like your headline of what you do or an offer that you make with an arrow that points down and then the actual link would be the description of the image. That is what you should have for your cover photo and it shows that you have a business and this is what you do. Alright, your profile picture should be your face only because no one can see tiny small bubbles of a huge body. You want it to be your face only, you should be smiling and looking happy and preferably with a nice camera that's a professional picture. Okay, nowadays with iPhones you can usually get like portrait style photos and they work pretty well. Okay, but you want it to be of your face looking like a nice human being that is friendly. Alright, this is important especially as you do cold messaging. The about section should be simply this headline, who you help do what without boo, right? So I help busy moms get fit without sacrificing their kids of their life. Okay, who do you help do what without boo? That's it, that's the headline and that's what you use in your about section every single time and then underneath of that you can have your link to a call to action or a widget or an ebook or whatever you want or just a straight up call time. Alright, now you know link your personal page to a business page, same rules apply with the business page. Make sure they have a cover photo and a profile photo that look good and that you have transformations and you've already posted a few things on there, client testimonials, etc. Some content about food, that kind of stuff. Alright, featured photos. So when you're in your personal page your featured photos are important because that's the thing that most people see. Alright, so having a couple transformations and then if you want, this is encouraged, have some sort of lean magnet that is amazing, right? Have a beautiful ebook or video series or whatever that reflect what you do and who you help. Alright, so if someone needs to see that and think, oh, these are for busy moms, I'm a busy mom and they help them do what without boo, that's exactly what I want, right? How to eat cake and have a slim waist, whatever, right? Link to lead magnet. So ebook, temin video and either of these things you want to really break only one belief. That's all you need to do. You don't need to break, you don't need to write an entire essay. It's just you need to break one belief with this video or an ebook with an application below it to get them to apply. Alright, now how do you break a belief? It's very straightforward. You're going to say what most people believe. So it's a lot like myth busting. Most people think that you have to eat small meals all day in order to lose weight. Most people think that you have to eat carbs or fat to lose weight. Most people think you have to give up everything that you love and you can't have pizza or an ice cream. Most people think that you need to work out for two hours a day. Most people think that you need to do cardio to lose weight. There's a million myths that you can put in there. Like, you can disagree with anything that I just said. The point is you have to say what you believe that is something that is common, that is a myth that people believe that you're going to break. Alright, so you'll say what they believe, then you'll say, this is why that's not true. This is what is true and then here's proof. Here's Jenny who used to only chicken and broccoli and she couldn't lose weight and now she eats cupcakes and loses weight. Whatever. That is the point. That is a four step belief breaking process and you only need to break one belief in the video and if you break one belief people will be intrigued and then they will schedule and apply. Alright, if you don't know how to make a 3D image for a lead magnet, let me show you the easiest tool in the galaxy, which is this puppy. Do-do-do, 3D kayak. Alright, so when you're in here, you're going to select one of these puppies. Boop, let's say it's that. Go next, you'll insert the image and then it will drag it onto there. I don't even know if I have any images up here. Let's see here. Well, we'll just pretend that. Let's see if this is an image. Do-do-do. Yeah, sure. We'll make this my ebook. Whatever. We're going to upload it. Cool. Next. And then we're going to download this puppy. Check it out. Alright, let me use this one instead because this would be a better one since this is actually an ebook cover. That actually makes sense. Alright, so we'll go back to the beginning real quick. What do we have to do? Alright. What am I missing here? There we go. Alright, cool. That's the book. There we go. And here it is. So there's your new ebook. If you do a PNG file, it's going to have a transparent background. If you have a JPEG, then it will have a background. I do PNGs because I think they look better. So that would be the simplest way for you to do this and set up your own ebook if you need to have an image. That is the easiest way for you to do it. Rock and roll.
